_meta.style: Warm editorial flat illustration. Hand-drawn line work over soft fills, muted paper texture, terracotta + ember + warm cream palette anchored on accent #d97757 and canvas #0e0f12 (dark) / #fafaf9 (light). Generous negative space. Reads as a thoughtful study product, not a SaaS dashboard. No photorealism, no 3D render, no gradients with shine, no stock-art clip-art, no text in the image unless the prompt explicitly asks for a wordmark.
_meta.negative: no photoreal, no 3d render, no glossy gradients, no stock-photo people, no watermarks, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers, no signage with random text, no logos of real companies

curio-logo.prompt: A minimalist editorial wordmark logo for 'Curio', warm cream background, hand-drawn serif lettering in terracotta #b04829, paired with a small circular logomark to the left containing a stylized open book whose pages curl into a question-mark spiral. Flat illustration, soft paper texture, single accent color, generous margin, balanced composition, designed for use on light backgrounds. The word 'Curio' must be spelled clearly and legibly.

curio-mark.prompt: A square app icon, 512x512, deep charcoal background #0e0f12, containing only a single terracotta #d97757 logomark: a stylized open book whose pages curl into a question-mark spiral. Flat editorial illustration, hand-drawn line work, soft paper grain, centered, generous padding, no text, no wordmark.

adept-logo.prompt: A minimalist editorial wordmark logo for 'Adept', warm cream background, hand-drawn serif lettering in deep terracotta #913a1d, paired with a small square logomark to the left containing three concentric stepped chevrons pointing up. Flat illustration, soft paper texture, slightly more corporate than playful, balanced composition. The word 'Adept' must be spelled clearly and legibly.
